events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Born on July 7, 1940, in Liverpool, Ringo Starr is best known as the drummer for The Beatles, one of the most influential bands of all time.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 86th birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Sir Brian Harold May, born on July 19, 1947, is the iconic lead guitarist and co-founder of the rock band Queen.

angles.name: Birthday Shred
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Dr. Brian May! From astrophysics to stadium rock anthems, what an incredible career. What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Michael Philip Jagger, born on July 26, 1943, is the charismatic lead singer and a founding member of The Rolling Stones.

angles.name: Birthday Legend
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Happy Birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Rolling Stones track to get you moving?

events.title: MTV Launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) officially launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video ever aired.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember when MTV actually played music videos? On this day in 1981, the channel launched, forever changing the music landscape. The first video? The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Poetic, isn't it?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' released (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', on August 29, 1994, which quickly became a landmark of the Britpop era.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' – the album that kicked off a phenomenon. What's your favourite track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, hundreds of thousands gathered for Woodstock. Three days of peace, love, and music that defined a generation. Which iconic performance stands out for you?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42.

angles.name: Elvis Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll. It's 49 years since we lost Elvis Presley, but his music and legacy live on. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Shooting
events.blurb: Rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in a drive-by shooting in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and tragically died from his injuries on September 13, 1996.

angles.name: Tupac Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur. On this day, we reflect on the immense talent and impact of a hip-hop icon whose voice continues to resonate.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, widely regarded as one of the greatest guitarists of all time, died on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix. It's been 56 years since we lost a true guitar legend whose influence is still felt today.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' released (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on September 26, 1969, which famously features the iconic zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is as iconic as the music within. What's your favourite track from their final recorded masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Christine Ellen Hynde, born on September 7, 1951, is the lead vocalist, guitarist, and primary songwriter of the rock band The Pretenders.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, fronting The Pretenders with style and attitude since the late 70s.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: William John Paul Gallagher, born on September 21, 1972, is an English singer-songwriter best known as the frontman of Oasis and later Beady Eye.

angles.name: Birthday Rocker
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment, musical or otherwise?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released on October 11, 1971, becoming one of the most influential songs of the 20th century.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 'Imagine all the people, living life in peace...' On this day, we celebrate John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine', a song that continues to inspire. What does it mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, and it was released on November 10, 2001, revolutionising portable music with '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the click wheel? 25 years ago, Apple dropped the first iPod, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changing how we listen to music forever. What was the first song you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first James Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 007 and decades of iconic films, gadgets, and theme tunes. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate Bond song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Winston Ono Lennon, born on October 9, 1940, in Liverpool, was a co-founder of The Beatles and an iconic solo artist.

angles.name: John Lennon Tribute
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message of peace continue to inspire generations.
